case_title: O'GRADY PLUMBING VS. BAY AREA PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-22-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT, PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL O'GRADY--BUSINESS OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'GRADY PLUMBING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $475.00 FILED BY O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PROPERTIES C/O LIZ QUESADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED APR-15-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PROPERTIES C/O LIZ QUESADA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RE-SERVED THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
